meaning: adj.排外的,孤高的,唯我独尊的,独占的,唯一的,高级的
examples: Some papers thought they had an exclusive.
The hotel has exclusive access to the beach.
Our group will have exclusive use of a 60-foot boat.
Throughout her career, Phillips has garnered exclusive interviews with some of the world's most public figures.
Getting on a horse in Iceland is not like being initiated into an exclusive equine cult.
